---
title: "About Me"
image: "Image\IMG_1407.jpg"   # MUST be relative path in repo
about:
  template: jolla
  links:                     # social buttons
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yourname/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/cait-oreilly
---

I’m a developer who loves building beautiful and functional experiences online. I work mainly with Quarto for documentation and portfolio sites, and I enjoy crafting modern, responsive designs with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. When I’m not coding, you’ll find me exploring new tech, creating art, or sharing projects with the community.

### Skills

- HTML
- CSS
- JavaScript
- Quarto
- Responsive Design
- Bootstrap
